## Description

Example: Analyze Bentley Bot performance metrics in MLFlow.

- [ ] Example: Build Gradio dashboard for visualization

- [ ] Example: Metrics logged in MLFlow
- [ ] Example: Optuna trials produce best parameters
- [ ] Example: Gradio dashboard accessible
